case_title: ASHRAF HASSAN VS. IMPERIAL PARKING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASSAN, ASHRAF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMPERIAL PARKING CORPORATION $2,483.29 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,545.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
